name: PROVIDENT FINANCIAL HOLDINGS INC
summary: Provident Financial Holdings, Inc. is a Delaware holding company for Provident Savings Bank, F.S.B., a federally chartered stock savings bank founded in 1956 and headquartered in Riverside, California. The Bank operates 13 full-service offices in the Inland Empire, offering community banking services including single-family, multi-family, and commercial real estate loans, deposit accounts, investment services, and trustee services for real estate transactions through its subsidiary Provident Financial Corp (PFC).

products.name: Single-family mortgage loans
products.description: First trust deed mortgage loans held for investment or sale, primarily fixed-rate.

products.name: Multi-family real estate loans
products.description: Loans secured by multi-family residential real estate properties.

products.name: Commercial real estate loans
products.description: Loans secured by commercial real estate properties.

products.name: Construction loans
products.description: Loans for construction of real estate properties.

products.name: Commercial business loans
products.description: Loans to small and mid-sized businesses.

products.name: Consumer loans
products.description: Consumer lending products offered by the Bank.

products.name: Deposit accounts
products.description: Federally insured deposit products for consumers and businesses in the Inland Empire.

products.name: Investment services
products.description: Investment services offered through the Bank's community banking operations.

products.name: Trustee services
products.description: Real estate transaction trustee services provided through subsidiary Provident Financial Corp (PFC).

partnerships.partner_name: Federal Home Loan Bank of San Francisco
partnerships.description: Bank has been a member since 1956, providing a source of funding.
